name: QuickBooks Online
description: QuickBooks Online is commonly used to support accounting workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use QuickBooks Online when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in accounting work.
founderWorkflow: Use QuickBooks Online to keep accounting work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding QuickBooks Online before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
